title: Figure 3 in Multiplex-PCR differentiation of two Hyalomma and two Haemaphysalis species (Acari: Ixodidae)
author: Hosseini-Chegeni, Asadollah

description: Figure 3. General schema of representative female dorsal scutum of Hyalomma anatolicum (A) and Hy. asiaticum (B), both collected from Lorestan province (size of specimens was not considered).
